message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 60
  BoxPadding 20
  MessageAlign left
}

participant LoaderPlugin as LP
participant ContentServer as CS
participant FS as FS

LP -> CS : LoadBundleIndexes()

loop [for each index file]
  CS -> FS : ReadFile()
  FS --> CS
  CS -> CS : parse ContentBundleIndex instances,\nfill mountpoint mappings
end

CS --> LP
@enduml
